subcodes.first_line: O Alif! Upon thee be My salutation and My glory! O Fá! Upon thee be My mercy and My grace! Rest thou assured in the loving-kindness of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الف علیک سلامی و بهائی یا فا علیک رحمتی و فضلی کن مطمئنا بعنایه الله و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
